ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the event took place */,
  "place" TEXT /* Place where the event was held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event mode */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "prize" TEXT /* Prize awarded to the winner(s) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event */,
  "entry_fee" TEXT /* Entry fee for the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode (e.g., 1on1, 2on2, 4on4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., single-elimination, round-robin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the division belongs to */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the division */,
  "entry_requirements" TEXT /* Specific requirements for joining the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the group belongs to */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the group */,
  "entry_requirements" TEXT /* Specific requirements for joining the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the player */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the player's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team */,
  "date_of_formation" TEXT /* Date of formation of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the team */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the team */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's profile picture */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the participant is part of */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player (if participant is a player) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team (if participant is a team) */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of the participant (e.g., 1on1, 2on2, 4on4) */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the participant belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the participant belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matchups" (
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matchup */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the matchup belongs to */,
  "participant1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first participant */,
  "participant2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second participant */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner (if applicable) */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the matchup */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the matchup */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the matchup */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first participant */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second participant */,
  "replay_url" TEXT /* URL of the matchup replay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matchup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES event_participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_participant1_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant1_id") REFERENCES event_participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_participant2_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant2_id") REFERENCES event_participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sponsor */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact person for the sponsor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the sponsor */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the sponsorship is for */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the sponsorship */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sponsorship */,
  "contract_url" TEXT /* URL of the sponsorship contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the stream is for */,
  "stream_url" TEXT /* URL of the stream */,
  "stream_date" TEXT /* Date of the stream */,
  "stream_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the stream */,
  "stream_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the stream */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the stream */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the statistic is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player (if applicable) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team (if applicable) */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "statistic_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, player, team) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date of the message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the message has been read */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the message has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
